mapper.sql: id, title, subtitle, author, translator, isbn, publisher, publish_date, `language`, page_count, description, cover_image, price, discount_price, stock, sold_count, view_count, category_id, keywords, status, rating, rating_count, is_recommended, is_hot, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from books b where b.category in
#{item}
and not exists ( select 1 from borrow_records br where br.user_id = #{userId} and br.book_id = b.id) and b.available_copies > 0 order by (b.total_copies - b.available_copies)
